# Notion Knowledge Database

Create a Notion database named `GRC Companion Knowledge`.

Columns:

- Title: title
- Type: select
- Brain Primitive: multi-select
- Body: text
- Source URL: url

Import source:

- `knowledge/index.json`

Each approved card should become one row. Put the card title in Title, card type in Type, primitive codes in Brain Primitive, the markdown body in Body, and the first public reference URL in Source URL.
